questions.question: Convert the following CFG to Chomsky Normal Form: S → aSb | ε
expectedPoints: Final CNF: S → AC | AB, A → a, B → b, C → SB

questions.question: Explain the importance of normal forms in context-free grammar theory and describe the step-by-step process for converting a CFG to Chomsky Normal Form.
expectedPoints: Purpose: simplification, canonical forms, parsing efficiency
Step 1: Eliminate ε-productions by identifying nullable variables
Step 2: Eliminate unit productions using transitive closure
Step 3: Eliminate useless symbols (non-generating and unreachable)
Step 4: Convert remaining productions to proper CNF form
